selected: to test the might of supplicants

system.moves:
- Politely offer a chance to back down
- Restrain an opponent’s limb
- Whisssper a foe’s own doubts in their ear

The Nerth Tree grows in the Great Wood. It can only be found by one mortal each midsummer, by following a particular path in the woods (page 516). The roots are littered with bones of former supplicants. Hanging from the tree: a great serpent. Crush it and eats its heart, and you will gain its vitality. But good luck with that.
